parent_I04R1_authority.disposition: semantic correction retained; machine overlay supersedes only exact estimator/window/arrival/diversion execution identities

complete_two_arm_evaluability.implementation: p2_i2_i04r2_analysis.primary_margin validates all three envelopes before delegating to the exact I04R1 strongest-arm estimator; any operational record returns null comparator and margin

I05_exact_estimator_path.superseded_behavior: I04R1 future entrypoint directly called normalized_paired_difference on one equal pair
I05_exact_estimator_path.corrected_behavior: I04R2 future entrypoint builds separate raw candidate, q1-only, and q2-only response envelopes, calls p2_i2_i04r2_analysis.primary_margin, then writes, reads, parses, and byte-reconstructs the complete record

diversion_admissibility.failure_effect: affected mode cannot register and cannot substitute a weaker comparator

arrival_gain_and_domain.measured_rule: abs(raw B gain - expected native arrival gain) <= separately registered runtime tolerance
arrival_gain_and_domain.domain_rule: B_before and B_after inside one I06-registered finite closed native-coherence interval
arrival_gain_and_domain.adjustment_rule: no clipping, saturation, projection, budget correction, conservation adjustment, or other arrival adjustment event

window_before_zero.scientific_zero_steps: exact null/null IDs with two empty-queue step kinds
window_before_zero.additional_receipts: feedback evaluation, policy, producer invocation, producer receipt, pre/post queue identities, and zero contamination IDs

order_conditioned_classification.not_top_effect: top signature unavailable only; no direct hypothesis-failure mapping

future_calibration_identity.generator: five seeds by two physical orders by three separate equal raw response envelopes
future_calibration_identity.serialization_reconstruction: governed output write/read, JSON reconstruction, and byte-identical reserialization in the same I05 invocation
future_calibration_identity.authorization: one future invocation only after explicit owner acceptance of I04R2 and an identity-binding I05 freeze

public_source_identity.finding: arrival assigns target_coherence + packet.amount; no arrival transform
coherence is an untransformed float field
runtime numeric helpers require finite coherence and positive finite packet amount

gate_boundary.on_explicit_owner_acceptance: pass P2-I2-CAL-PRE-GATE and open checklist/hypothesis-first I05 authorization construction for exactly one governed arithmetic-null invocation
